basicInfo.name: Nightmare Ace
basicInfo.flavor: Once, just before Ace would have received a killing blow, his enemy was sliced in two. Rumor has it that he mastered his sword after responding to its voice.

Normal Attack.desc:
Single Enemy
 - Deals damage equal to 100% of Physical Attack 1 time(s).
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 100% of Physical Attack.

Skill 1.name: Lunar Slash
Skill 1.desc:
Single Enemy
 - Deals damage equal to 120% of Physical Attack 2 time(s).
 - Self
 - Heals HP equal to 8% of the caster's Max HP.
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 120% of Physical Attack.

Skill 2.name: Blossom Slash
Skill 2.desc:
3 Enemies
 - Deals damage equal to 140% of Physical Attack 1 time(s).
 - 100% chance to inflict Damage Reduction [Duration: 10 Turn(s)]
 - 100% chance to inflict All Attack Reduction. [Duration: 10 Turn(s)]
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 140% of Physical Attack.

Passive.name: Unwavering Command
Passive.desc:
All Enemies
 - Inflicts Incoming Healing Reduction. [Always Active]
 - Self
 - Grants Guts. [Once per Battle]
 - Grants a Barrier equal to 1000% of the caster's Physical Attack upon triggering Guts. [Duration: 50 Turn(s)]
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Effect: Incoming Healing Reduction to 32%.

profile.story:
Before his tenth birthday, Ace lost his grandfather and parents and was suddenly thrust into leadership of Moonlit Isle.
Despite his young age, Ace strove to fulfill his duties as Moonlit Isle's Lord and managed to inherit his family's heirloom, the Leader Sword.
However, taking possession of a sword and earning respect of his subjects were worlds apart.
Other houses of power on Moonlit Isle were unwilling to accept a child ruler, and they repeatedly conspired to take the seat of power and Ace's life. Ace barely survived assassination attempt after assassination attempt with the aid of his uncle and sister, Daisy.
Fearing for Ace's safety, his uncle sought out Teo and asked him to become Ace's mentor.
Teo, a trusted ally of Ace's late grandfather, felt a sense of duty to protect his friend's grandchild and took Ace as his pupil.
Teo trained to help Ace stand on his own, but Ace struggled to improve due to limited talent with the sword.
Still, with Teo staying in the castle as Ace's mentor, no one dared attack the young lord.
But during Teo's absence, Waki, a trusted aide, betrayed Ace by rallying the barons and inciting rebellion, plunging Moonlit Isle into a civil war.
Teo returned with allies to quell the uprising, but he knew it was only a matter of time before another conflict arose. So he started training Ace more intensely.
When the agreed period of mentorship came to an end, Ace faced a final test.
He had to transform the Leader Sword into the Moonlight Sword.
Ace passed the test, and Teo departed, satisfied he had done all he could as Ace's mentor.
After Teo left, Ace pushed himself to new heights, determined to fill the gap between his swordsmanship and that of his mentor.
With Teo gone, the barons stirred again, and this time Ace had to stand his ground without Teo's help.
Ace's talents started to shine on the battlefield...
He mastered not only the art of swordplay, but also the art of commanding armies, reaching an unparalleled level of talent as a commander.
In time, Ace's might silenced all would-be challengers on Moonlit Isle, and recognizing his achievement, the emperor made him one of the Four Lords.
